mapper.select: SELECT result.id, result.task_id, result.throughput, result.average_aoi, result.convergence_step, result.metrics_json, result.artifact_path, result.created_at FROM simulation_result result JOIN experiment_task task ON task.id = result.task_id WHERE result.task_id = #{taskId} AND task.creator_id = #{creatorId} LIMIT 1
